name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Miami Gardens, FL - 5 Star Car Title Loans car title loan storefront at 17501 NW 27th Ave
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates a standalone car title loan storefront at 17501 NW 27th Ave in Miami Gardens, FL. This North Miami Gardens location serves residents and commuters seeking quick cash solutions backed by vehicle equity.

The Miami Gardens branch provides car title loans and emergency financial services. Borrowers can reach the Miami Gardens office at +1 305-376-7852 to discuss loan terms, vehicle requirements, and eligibility criteria.

Miami Gardens, FL residents who need rapid cash access can visit with their vehicle's title and valid state ID. 5 Star Car Title Loans offers same-day approval for qualified borrowers with clear vehicle titles.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No credit check required; explicitly serves borrowers with bad credit
Fast approval and funding (same-day documented in customer reviews)
Loan amounts up to $50,000, covering true emergency and larger cash needs
Borrowers keep vehicle keys and can continue driving while repaying
Customer reviews document transparent risk disclosure and no upselling tactics
Multiple vehicle types accepted (cars, motorcycles, RVs, commercial trucks)
Online pre-qualification available in minutes via website
cons: Title loans are collateralized debt—default results in vehicle repossession and loss of transportation
APR, interest rates, and exact repayment terms not disclosed on website, making true cost opaque
High-risk product historically associated with debt traps and rollover cycles
Requires proof of ability to repay and vehicle title as collateral, excluding low-equity or financed vehicles
Limited location availability (physical office only in Miami Gardens; nationwide lending unclear)
best_for: Borrowers with bad credit who cannot qualify for personal loans or credit cards
Vehicle owners facing genuine emergency expenses with ability to repay within advertised terms
Consumers who have exhausted safer alternatives and own vehicles with clear/low-lien titles
Borrowers seeking faster funding than traditional lenders but willing to accept collateral risk
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for borrowers with bad credit facing genuine emergencies who own vehicles with clear titles and have documented ability to repay. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-risk collateralized debt—APR and exact terms are not disclosed on the website, and default results in vehicle repossession. This product should only be used when safer alternatives (personal loans, credit cards, credit union PALs, employer advances) are genuinely unavailable.
services: Title retention service (borrower keeps vehicle keys during repayment)
AI calculator for loan amount estimation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 17501 NW 27th Ave, Miami Gardens, FL. Quick car title loans with rapid approval.
